name: fecms-restful
description: Fire Extinguisher Management System - RESTful Microservices

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend/gateway" "npm run start --prefix backend/user-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/extinguisher-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/inspection-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/reporting-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/notification-service"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "GATEWAY,USERS,AUTH,EXTINGUISHER,INSPECTION,REPORTING,NOTIFICATION" --no-color "npm run dev --prefix backend/gateway" "npm run dev --prefix backend/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/extinguisher-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/inspection-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/reporting-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/notification-service"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "GATEWAY,USERS,AUTH,EXTINGUISHER,INSPECTION,REPORTING,NOTIFICATION,FRONTEND" --no-color "npm run dev --prefix backend/gateway" "npm run dev --prefix backend/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/extinguisher-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/inspection-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/reporting-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend/gateway && npm install --prefix backend/user-service && npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/extinguisher-service && npm install --prefix backend/inspection-service && npm install --prefix backend/reporting-service && npm install --prefix backend/notification-service && npm install --prefix frontend
